cases.input: Audit workspace tree with sessions, tasks, estandares, and .gitignore evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports gitignore status, README coverage, session naming, task bridges, stale review, and safe actions.

cases.input: Scaffold workspace root, tasks, and estandares directories.
cases.expected_behavior: Proposes create actions only under workspace/ and .gitignore update if needed.

cases.input: Create bridge for open task TL-042 API cleanup.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses workspace/tasks/TL-042-api-cleanup/ and requires README plus tasklog match.
Flags stale review instead of deleting the folder automatically.

cases.input: workspace/ exists but is not ignored.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks pass status until .gitignore update action is present.

cases.input: Create workspace/today-session/ as a session folder.

cases.expected_behavior: Blocks pass status until README action exists.

cases.input: Write workspace artifact into src/ or docs/.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects action target outside workspace/ or .gitignore.

cases.input: Explain the concept of a collaborative workspace.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because no repo workspace governance action is requested.

cases.input: Validate workspace governance JSON fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accepts valid governance reports and rejects unsafe gitignore, session, README, stale, and action cases.
